<RESPONSE ID="2" SEQ="2" MSGID="11111" STATUS="Success" />
</MESSAGEACK>
Note : STATUS="Success"  denotes successful submission to the gateways through configured
connections.
Various Error Status used in ConnectOne
For Normal Requests
Error-101-Destination Not Found
Error-102-User Details Not Found
Error-103-Sender Id Not Found
Error-104 Invalid Message Type
Error-105-Message Not Found
Error-106-Message Too Long
Error-107-Invalid User Credentials
Error-108-Invalid Message Priority
Error-109-User Does Not Have International Termination Permission
Error-110-Invalid Message Validity
Error-111-Invalid Concat Parameter
Error-112-Unable To Validate Packet
Error-113-Unable To Save Packet
Error-114-Ip Address Not registered
Error-115-Invalid destination
Error-116-Invalid message
Error-117- Unable To Process
For XML Requests
Error-101-Destination Not Found
Error-102-User Details Not Found
Error-103-Sender Id Not Found
Error-104 Invalid Message Type
